description: A Breitbart news graphic with the Breitbart 'B' logo at top right. A photograph fills the frame showing a man in a dark suit and blue tie speaking in front of a US flag and red drapes. A bold headline bar overlaid in white and yellow reads 'TRUMP ADMINISTRATION ACTIVELY RE-VETTING BIDEN MIGRANTS GIVEN GREEN CARDS'.
notable_text: TRUMP ADMINISTRATION ACTIVELY RE-VETTING BIDEN MIGRANTS GIVEN GREEN CARDS; BREITBART
